body.title: Second pass on absorbed source with DeepSeek — compare vs baseline
body.result: Done: DeepSeek vs Qwen comparison completed. Qwen won by one unit extracted. Results not tracked due to missing reader provenance (T-reader-provenance-fix filed). Closing.
body.proposal: Igor wants to edit wild_igor/igor/brainstem/kernel.py (HIGH inertia). Plan: . Reason: HIGH inertia write requires human approval: wild_igor/igor/brainstem/kernel.py
body.description: Run a second pass on a previously-absorbed source using DeepSeek (OR batch). Compare node count, edge density, and concept reach against T-reading-measure-baseline. Validates whether model quality and re-pass both matter.
